svg.title: Data Engineering Lab 2 System Design
svg.desc: Local batch and streaming recommendation pipeline with MySQL, PySpark, MinIO, PostgreSQL pgvector, FastAPI, Redpanda, event producer, and stream processor.
svg.text: Data Engineering Lab 2: Local Batch and Streaming Recommendation System
Every component runs locally with Docker and Docker Compose.
Key idea: batch prepares training data and embeddings; streaming uses those embeddings to produce real-time recommendations.
